article.title: Sleep and endocrine effects of acupuncture for insomnia: a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials.
article.authors: Hu Y, Liu Y, Li W
article.abstract: Insomnia, a prevalent sleep disorder linked to endocrine dysfunction, severely impairs quality of life. Acupuncture has been widely applied for its management, but evidence on its impact on sleep outcomes and endocrine regulation remains uncertain.
